name: run_sql_query
description: Runs a named stored query against the Sports 2000 OpenEdge database. Queries: top_customers, open_orders, low_stock_items, sales_by_rep, recent_invoices. Filter by param1 CustNum for orders/invoices. Returns up to 50 rows as JSON.

query_name.description: Stored query: top_customers | open_orders | low_stock_items | sales_by_rep | recent_invoices

param1.description: Optional CustNum to filter open_orders or recent_invoices by customer.
